results.rendered_html:
pratīkz (prati-√īkṣ) Ā. pratikṣate (ep. also P. ˚ti), to look at, behold, perceive,  AV. ;  KātyŚr. ;
to look forward to, wait for, expect,  TS.  &c. &c.;
to look at with indifference, bear with, tolerate (acc.),  Mn. ix, 77.

results.rendered_html:
pratīkṣ 1 A.
1 To look at, observe, consider.
2 To look out for, expect.
3 To wait for, await; saṃpatsyate vaḥ kāmoyaṃ kālaḥ kaścitpratīkṣyatāṃ  Ku. 2. 54 ; 2. 37 ;  Ms. 9. 77.
